basicDetails.schemeName: Supply of School Uniform , Shoes Socks to all Students for Std IX to XII

state.label: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

references.title: Supply Of School Unifrom, Shoes Socks To All Students For IX To XII

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: Provision of complete uniform(Shirt, Pants, Skirt, Tie, Belt) socks, shoes to all students in classes IX to XII of Government schools. It ensures that every child, regardless of their socio-economic background, has the basic physical tools required for a productive learning environment. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline and equality among male and female students, removing social distinctions based on attire.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students. 2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes. 3. Providing shoes and socks promotes better foot health and hygiene for students commuting to school. 4. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs
schemeContent.briefDescription: Supply of School Uniform, Shoes Socks to all Students for IX to XII studying in Govt Schools

children.text: Provision of complete uniform(Shirt, Pants, Skirt, Tie, Belt) socks, shoes  to all students in classes IX to XII of Government schools. It ensures that every child, regardless of their socio-economic background, has the basic physical tools required for a productive learning environment. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline and equality among male and female students, removing social distinctions based on attire.
1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students.
2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes.
3. Providing shoes and socks promotes better foot health and hygiene for students commuting to school.
4. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs
Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md: 1. No separate application is required. 1. Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a student. 2. The applicant should be studying in class 9th to 12th. 3. The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.

children.text: 1.	The applicant should be a student.
2.	The applicant should be studying in class 9th to 12th.
3.	The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
